name: La Mansion's Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lime juice, chopped garlic, black pepper, olive oil, chopped cilantro, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Marinate the chicken, covered, in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour or up to overnight.
3. Grill the marinated chicken on a barbecue grill (over mesquite if desired) until it is cooked through.
4. Cut the cooked chicken into bite-size strips.
5. Place the strips on warm flour tortillas and add desired toppings such as shredded lettuce, tomato, salsa, pico de gallo, guacamole, and/or sour cream.
6. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
